about.title: What Is a Business Website?
about.description1: A business website is a multi-page online presence designed to showcase your company, services, expertise, and achievements. It helps potential customers learn more about your business and build trust before making contact.
about.description2: Unlike a landing page, a business website can grow with your company, support SEO, include a blog, portfolio, service pages, and provide a solid foundation for Google Ads campaigns.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Answers to common questions about business websites, SEO, content, and long-term growth.

item1.question: How long does it take to build a business website?
item1.answer: Most business websites are completed within 2–4 weeks depending on the number of pages, content, and required functionality.

item2.question: How many pages can my website have?
item2.answer: Business websites typically include 5–20 pages, but the structure can be expanded at any time as your company grows.

item3.question: Is SEO included?
item3.answer: Yes. Every website includes SEO-friendly structure, metadata, performance optimization, and mobile responsiveness.

item4.question: Can you create a multilingual website?
item4.answer: Absolutely. We can build websites in multiple languages with language switching functionality.

item5.question: Do you help with Google Ads and analytics?
item5.answer: Yes. We can set up Google Ads, GA4 analytics, conversion tracking, and help optimize marketing performance.

item6.question: Can the website be expanded later?
item6.answer: Yes. New pages, blog sections, services, integrations, and additional functionality can be added at any time.
